name: Southern Baked Corn
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a skillet and brown the onion and green pepper.
2. Gradually stir in the flour, then mix in the milk until thick and smooth.
3. Stir in the egg yolks, corn, vinegar, salt, and pepper.
4. Fold in the egg whites to combine.
5. Sprinkle with bread crumbs.
6. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 20-30 minutes.
